ast.name: description
ast.source: This is how you press a key, where `KEYCODE` is the name of the key you want pressed. Keycodes can be found here.
ast.target: 这是按键的方法，其中 `KEYCODE` 是你要按下的键名。键码可在 此处 找到。

ast.name: description
ast.source: , is used to add a delay between key presses where `DELAY` is the amount in ms.
ast.target: , 用于在按键之间添加延迟，其中 `DELAY` 为毫秒数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: " is used to type text where `TEXT` is the text you want typed
ast.target: " 用于输入文本，其中 `TEXT` 是你要输入的文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: # is used to add a comment where `COMMENT` is the comment you want to add.
ast.target: # 用于添加注释，其中 `COMMENT` 是你要添加的注释。

ast.name: description
ast.source: \ is used to escape a character where `CHAR` is the character you want to escape.
ast.target: \ 用于转义字符，其中 `CHAR` 是你要转义的字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: {}() is used to repeat a sequence of keys where `REPEAT` is the sequence you want to repeat.
ast.target: {}() 用于重复一串按键，其中 `REPEAT` 是你要重复的序列。
